questions.question: Who was the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom during the Casablanca Conference?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Name of the British Prime Minister who attended the conference

questions.question: What was the codename for the Casablanca Conference?
questions.expected_answer_hint: The codename given to the conference held in Casablanca

questions.question: When in 1942 was the Doolittle Raid launched?
How many days after the Doolittle Raid did the Battle of Midway take place?
questions.expected_answer_hint: duration in days between the Doolittle Raid and the Battle of Midway

questions.question: How did the treatment of Jews in Germany and German-occupied territories differ before and after the invasion of the Soviet Union in June 1941?
questions.expected_answer_hint: methods of persecution, key events, and changes in policy

questions.question: Compare the experiences of Jews living in central and western Europe with those in eastern Europe during the lead-up to World War II.
questions.expected_answer_hint: level of integration, religious practices, and political climate

questions.question: Who was the First Lord of the Admiralty who requested additional ships and men to fight the Battle of the Atlantic on 5 March 1941?
questions.expected_answer_hint: The name of the person who made the request to Parliament.

questions.question: Which German naval commander believed that a large surface fleet was not needed to defeat the British, and instead advocated for the use of U-boats?  Provide the title and name of the commander.
questions.expected_answer_hint: The title and name of the German naval commander who proposed using U-boats to strangle the British economy.

questions.question: How did the relationship between the United Kingdom and the United States evolve from September 1940 to December 1941, and what key documents reflected this relationship?
questions.expected_answer_hint: mention the Atlantic Charter and the formality of the neutrality during this time

questions.question: What resulted in the Soviet Union joining the Allies in June 1941, and how did this event alter the dynamics of World War II alliances?
questions.expected_answer_hint: mention the German invasion of the Soviet Union and previous non-aggression pact
